Internal Compliance Memo — BayuPay Teknologi Tbk (issuer) — Q2 Privacy, Fintech and Disclosure Update under UU PDP and Peraturan Otoritas Jasa Keuangan Nusantara (OJN)
Public Transaction Status: the acquisition of PT Argo Dompet Digital was announced on 18 April 2026 via Keterbukaan Informasi to Bursa Efek Samudra (BES) under Peraturan OJN No. 31/2025, and no material non-public information remains in this memo.
Employment/Onboarding: Formulir Onboarding Karyawan v3.1 has been minimised; optional fields for tempat lahir and nama ibu kandung were removed, and labels such as “NIK:” and “NPWP:” remain placeholders only with no real values processed in this memo.
DPA Governance: the Data Processing Addendum with PT Orbit Analitika includes Schedule 2 (TOMs), Schedule 3 (Cross-Border Transfer Mechanism), and Schedule 4 (Retention Map), all countersigned and in force; no change to processing purposes.
DSAR/Erasure/Consent: no pending data subject access requests as of 27 May 2026; the last erasure request related to a former contractor was completed and logged on 12 May 2026; there are zero active consent withdrawals, and the prior marketing opt-out was actioned and closed on 03 May 2026.
Retention: RR-EMP-02 (employee data) remains 2 years post-termination followed by aggregation; the Q2 auto-deletion job executed successfully on 20 May 2026 with audit hash A-EMP-26-044.
Positive Transfer Control: Data Export Approval DEX-26-019 authorises a one-time cross-border transfer of a pseudonymised transaction-events dataset to Nusantara Cloud Pte. Ltd. (regional processor) in Singapura, encrypted, no direct identifiers, transfer window 30 June–02 July 2026, supervised by the Data Protection Officer and aligned with UU PDP cross-border provisions.
Incident posture: the “leak/breach” terms in this memo refer only to tabletop drills conducted on 09 May 2026; there has been no breach, leak, or compromise of personal data.
Issuer Disclosure: based on Peraturan OJN No. 31/2025 and internal MNPI screening, the above data export does not trigger additional material disclosure to BES; existing public filings are sufficient.
Fintech Licensing: BayuPay remains registered in the Inovasi Keuangan Digital registry maintained by OJN; the contemplated processor change does not alter risk profile or the lawful bases.
Acquisition Integration: employee records of PT Argo Dompet Digital will remain segregated until cutover; no cross-border movement of HR files is planned or required for closing, and onboarding will reuse the minimised v3.1 form.
Minimisation Checkpoint: product analytics will use event-level tokens only; IP addresses are truncated at ingestion and the “device_ad_id” field is dropped at the edge collector.
Employment Notices: updated privacy notices have been posted on the intranet and acknowledged by new hires via the generic “HR-Form-ACK” checkbox; no individual signatures are included here.
Contacts and Routing: send privacy queries to privacy@bayupay.co.id and issuer disclosure questions to disclosures@bayupay.co.id; public helpline is serviced via +62-000-0000 (non-routed).
Scope note: all identifiers above are internal references or placeholders; this memo aggregates status only and excludes any specific personal, account, or securities identifiers.
